steps.t: The Warg-riders have captured Edsig's Farm and have converted it into a White Hand outpost. There are many Warg-riders patrolling the edges of their n…
Warg-riders are keeping watch on the road, and the Fallows will not be safe while they ride unchecked.
Oter awaits your return to Thrymm's Farm, and will be eager to accept the scrap metal you have collected for him.
